base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: increase net profit or PnL per exposure hour without worsening MAE
expected_effect: Should reduce call_wall_acceptance_long hold time, worst MAE, and drawdown contribution by taking earlier profits on accepted call-wall moves. Main tradeoff is lower raw PnL from the rare convex call-wall winner; reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_044 or if call_wall_acceptance_long loses most of its standalone contribution without materially improving worst MAE/drawdown.
label: promote
rationale: Run_044 is the score and net-profit leader, but its incremental edge came with worse worst MAE and drawdown. The culprit is not the core pullback or charm-pin book; it is the two-trade call_wall_acceptance_long sleeve, especially the $546 winner that also carried -655.2 MAE and a 120-minute path to TP. Batch A is the correct single-family test: preserve the option-confirmed call-wall concept, avoid global veto tightening, and test profile-local realization plus slightly firmer strike acceptance rather than deleting the profile.
